{{Quote|My primary programming was installed by Lord Alferon Choots Bemming, the owner and chief operating officer of Bibliotron Systems|P-RC3|<ref name="DS" />}}
[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''Alferon Choots Bemming''' was a wealthy [[Gender/Legends|male]] inventor who was heir to the [[Bemming Shipping]] fortune, and owned and was the [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|CEO]] of [[Bibliotron Systems]], a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] design company on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He spent much of his personal time at the company, and was known to program droids himself, including [[P-RC3]]. The [[Bemming family]] also owned one of the largest private libraries of hard-copy books in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], with a collection of over seven million volumes.<ref name="DS" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1stm}}
